item.title: Staff Post - Open
item.content:encoded: The image that was used in this article is non-compliant with the SCP wiki's license (CC BY-SA 3.0) as it comes from here with no indication it has been released under Creative Commons. Thus, the image has been removed.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Found this through Young and under 30.

+ show block
– hide block

I was drawn in by the biology of how the creatures work, but the researcher logs lost me - specifically, the italicized notes that just explain what's going on. They don't feel like things a researcher would actually note that way. I never really got back on board from there. The idea that these things were created to enforce some standard of morality, rather than just being freaks of nature or having some agenda of their own, wasn't a direction I cared for. The beginning of the article is strong enough to balance out to a novote, though.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Intriguing, 1563 is a fencepost that protects people who are morally good and punish those whom are the opposite

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I have been meaning to rewrite this. Here it is.
